---
name: Bug report
about: Report a concrete Jetstream bug
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Context

What is wrong, where it happens, and why it matters.

## Reproduction

Steps, commands, input data, logs, or a failing test that demonstrate the bug.

## Definition of Done

The observable behavior, test, metric, or documentation change that would close
this issue.

## Notes

Constraints, alternatives, or follow-up work that should stay out of scope.
